title: taraxacum cochleatoides
intro: Taraxacum cochleatoides, also known as the earless dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Taraxacum cochleatoides is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be consumed as a supplement in capsule or powder form.
